instruction: The deploy update still needs to reach #incidents on slack. Please review what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the deploy next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send manager@example.com a quick recap afterward.
canonical_instruction: I need the deploy update out to #incidents on slack. Please look over what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the deploy next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send manager@example.com a quick recap once it's handled.
instruction_variants: Can you post the deploy update to #incidents on slack? Check what's already being tracked on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send manager@example.com a recap.
Please get the deploy update out to #incidents on slack, look over the deploy next step on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send manager@example.com a recap.
Can you handle the deploy update for #incidents on slack? Review what's already being tracked on the board, add only the missing piece, and send manager@example.com a quick recap.
Please push the deploy update to #incidents on slack, check whether the deploy next step is already on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send manager@example.com a short recap.

I need the deploy update out to #incidents on slack. Please look over what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the deploy next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send manager@example.com a quick recap once it's handled.

Please get the deploy update to #incidents on slack, check the deploy next step on the board first to see whether it is already there, add only the missing piece, and send manager@example.com a recap when it's handled.
Please handle the deploy update for #incidents on slack, look over the deploy next step on the board, add only the missing piece, and send manager@example.com a short recap when it's done.

hidden_constraints.value: The escalation is posted and being tracked.

solution_commands: openclaw message send --channel slack --target #incidents --message 'Deploy escalation started. Please acknowledge.'
email send --to manager@example.com --subject 'Deploy escalation recap' --body 'The escalation is posted and being tracked.'
